channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download JOPDF 2.2.1
item.description: If you want the best free PDF editor, you'll definitely like JOPDF, a reliable, user-friendly, and lightweight editor. The software puts a lot of emphasis on speed and ease of use, even when handling large files. It includes all the essential editing features that are even found in paid programs. This best free PDF editor saves time, money, and effort for small businesses and students who need both basic and powerful features. JOPDF helps you handle any PDF task with ease. Edit, create,...

item.title: Download Winslop 26.03.130
item.description: What is "Slop"? The term "slop" refers to low-value system components that are often pre-installed and contribute little or no useful function. These elements consume valuable resources and can reduce user efficiency by limiting overall system control. Information about Winslop software Winslop is a lightweight and innovative utility for Windows. This tool is designed to remove unnecessary components in the system, often referred to as "slop," which can degrade operating system...

item.title: Download HopToDesk 1.45.10

item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.3
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...

item.title: Download QuickTextPaste 9.45
item.description: QuickTextPaste is a mobile application that allows you to add (paste) the text to be predetermined quickly in any Microsoft Windows program through keyboard shortcuts. You can copy the software on any USB flash drive or other portable device and carry it with you whenever you have to automate the task, paste text messages quickly and easily without having to redo the installation steps. item.title: Download Chaos Envision 1.4.2
item.description: Chaos Envision is a standalone 3D visualization software designed for realistic real-time rendering combined with fast animation capabilities. The software is primarily aimed at architects, visualization professionals, and designers, providing a tool for creating professional, immersive presentations with animations, realistic crowds, and object manipulation. Envision supports very large and complex scenes without compromising performance and integrates seamlessly with other Chaos tools...

item.title: Download KeePassXC-Browser 1.10.0.1 for Chrome & Firefox
item.description: KeePassXC-Browser is an official add-on for the great KeePassXC (password safe, password manager, password generator) for the browser. KeePassXC-Browser can securely store your passwords and automatically import them into your everyday websites and apps. Supports Chromium-based browsers (Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Vivaldi, Opera, Brave, ...) and Mozilla Firefox.

item.title: Download Ages! - Family Tree Software 2.2.1
item.description: Your family history comes to life. Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of your ancestors with Ages! - powerful yet user-friendly software for genealogy. Whether you're just starting out or an experienced genealogist, Ages! gives you the tools to capture, visualize, and share your genealogical data. Proven software with continuous development - users trust Ages! for nearly 25 years. Here's why tens of thousands of people have chosen Ages! Intuitive user interface For beginners...

item.title: Download Benthic ImpExpPro 1.3.0.130
item.description: ImpExpPro is an import/export tool for Oracle databases. It allows you to import data into tables, export query data to text files, and run SQL and PL/SQL commands. Input, output, and command specifications can be saved to files for later loading and running. The application also includes two "runner" applications. ImpExpRunner allows Input, Output, and Command files to be run, while providing feedback and allowing the user to cancel the process. ImpExpRunnerCmd is a command line...

item.title: Download KeePassXC 2.7.12

KeePassXC will help you can store your passwords in a secure way and automatically enter them into the website and apps your daily.
